alexandria_own_philosophy.title: Why I think Alexandria & Redmont require their own political philosophy

internal_resignations.name: Internal Resignation(s)
internal_resignations.description: A player leaving the server permanently or seemingly permanently due to an external factor, a.k.a. real life obligation.

active_external_resignations.name: Active External Resignation(s)
active_external_resignations.description: A player leaving the server permanently or seemingly permanently as a result of active discouragement (through toxicity, unwelcome environment, community shunning etc.)

passive_external_resignations.name: Passive External Resigation(s)
passive_external_resignations.description: A player leaving the server permanently or seemingly permanently as a result of passive discouragement (inactivity, lack of manpower for project, lack of oppurtunity, lack of education etc.)
